violations.text: Observed the quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was (100) parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be (200-400) ppm. PIC changed out santizer and refilled sink and sanitization buckets at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

At the time of inspection, the following equipment was observed to be in need of adjustment/repair... - A Low Boy Cooler was observed to have a torn/ripped gasket. Gasket was replaced at the time of inspection. - The Walk-In Cooler was observed to have a worn gasket not allowing for a proper seal when the door is fully closed. - The Walk-In Cooler was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 43 degrees Fahrenheit with food temps observed to be maintained at 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Maintenance personnel was on site at he time of inspection to make needed adjustments/repairs. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the gaskets of the Cold Drawer units were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024
